vulnerability.name: CVE-2017-5645
vulnerability.description: log4j-core before 2.8.2 TcpSocketServer/UdpSocketServer deserialize log events from untrusted network sources without class filtering, enabling unauthenticated RCE.

statements.impact_statement: lib1 wraps TcpSocketServer only to expose it as a Runnable via AppenderFactory.createSocketServer(). lib1 itself never binds a socket, accepts connections, or deserializes network data — it only constructs and returns the server object. The deserialization RCE is only reachable if a caller actually starts the returned Runnable. lib1 alone does not trigger the vulnerable code path.
